data.content:
Shipment Handoff Capsule — foolery-062f

Root cause:
src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts terminateProcessGroup SIGTERMs (and
SIGKILLs after 5s) were silent, leaving zero trace of what killed any
agent child across watchdog, external abort, and connection manager
paths. This re-lands the fix for the "fake-fixed-already" class.

Files and functions touched (post-change):
- src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts
  - terminateProcessGroup (lines 310-341): new signature + entry log +
    SIGKILL branch log
- src/lib/agent-session-runtime-helpers.ts
  - fireWatchdogTimeout call site (line 304): passes "watchdog_timeout"
- src/lib/terminal-manager.ts
  - abortSession call site (line 464): passes "external_abort"
- src/lib/__tests__/agent-session-runtime-lifecycle.test.ts
  - describe("terminateProcessGroup") (lines 447-544): 2 tests updated
    with reason arg + console.warn spy; 2 new tests added asserting
    entry log format and SIGKILL branch log format.

New function signature:
  export function terminateProcessGroup(
    child: ChildProcess,
    reason: string,
    delayMs = 5000,
  ): void

Entry log format:
  [terminal-manager] [terminate-process-group] pid=<pid> reason=<reason> delayMs=<delayMs>

SIGKILL log format:
  [terminate-process-group] pid=<pid> reason=<reason> signal=SIGKILL (forced after <delayMs>ms)

Updated call sites with reasons:
- agent-session-runtime-helpers.ts:304 -> "watchdog_timeout"
- terminal-manager.ts:464 -> "external_abort"

Locking tests:
- "logs at entry with pid, reason, and tag" — spies console.warn,
  asserts first call contains [terminate-process-group], reason=, pid=,
  delayMs= after terminateProcessGroup(child, "watchdog_timeout", 1000).
- "logs SIGKILL branch when forced after delay" — uses fake timers,
  advances past delayMs, asserts the post-clear call contains
  [terminate-process-group], pid=, reason=external_abort, signal=SIGKILL,
  and the delay literal.

Commit hash: 8929ae99 (on origin/main)
Branch: worktree-foolery-062f

Quality gates: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (2711
passed), bun run build — all green.

Tag preserved: fake-fixed-already (not removed per instructions).
